mapper.select: SELECT a.name FROM product_allergies pa JOIN allergies a ON pa.allergy_id = a.allergy_id WHERE pa.product_id = #{productId}

SELECT pi.product_id, pi.category_id, pi.brand_id, pb.brand_name, pi.name, pi.description, pi.status, pi.image_url, pi.price, pi.weight, pi.kcal, pi.protein, pi.sodium, pi.sugar, pi.saturated_fat, pi.caffeine, pi.created_at, pi.updated_at, pi.informer_user_id, u.login_id AS informer_nickname FROM product_items pi JOIN product_brands pb ON pi.brand_id = pb.brand_id LEFT JOIN users u ON pi.informer_user_id = u.user_id WHERE pi.product_id = #{productId}
SELECT brand_name FROM product_brands ORDER BY brand_id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product_suggestions (user_id, product_id, user_note, status, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{productId}, #{userNote}, 'pending', CONVERT_TZ(NOW(), '+00:00', '+09:00'))
mapper.select: SELECT ps.suggestion_id, ps.user_id, ps.product_id, p.name AS product_name, -- product_items 테이블의 name을 product_name으로 가져옴 ps.user_note, ps.status, DATE_FORMAT(ps.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS created_at FROM product_suggestions ps JOIN product_items p ON ps.product_id = p.product_id WHERE ps.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY ps.created_at DESC
